'''Aneesa Dym''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pa'lowick/Legends|Pa'lowick]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], born on the planet [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the ''[[Dusty Duck]]''.

==Biography==
Raised by her father [[Neeamesh Dym]], the creator and original pilot of the ''Dusty Duck'', Aneesa Dym learned the smuggling trade at an early age. After her father's murder at the hands of an angry customer, she fell in love and partnered with [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Rango Tel]], the man who captured her father's murderer. Aneesa accompanied Tel throughout his short-lived career and was with him when he journeyed to [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] in search of his latest bounty. She was killed in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] while aboard the ''Dusty Duck'', waiting for Tel to return from the capture of [[Kam Nale]].

==Behind the scenes==
Aneesa Dym was created by [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] member [[Greg Mitchell]], a.k.a. ''Hedec Ga'', as part of his ''Dusty Duck'' backstory for the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' campaign on [[StarWars.com]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Wrath of Darth Maul]]'' {{Imo}}
